description.zh: 古埃及是人类最古老的文明之一。法老被视为荷鲁斯在世间的化身，既是世俗君主也是神圣存在。国家围绕玛阿特（宇宙秩序）运行，以宰相为行政首长，大祭司掌管宗教事务，书吏记录一切，形成了延续三千年的神权官僚体系。
description.en: Ancient Egypt was one of humanity's oldest civilizations. The Pharaoh was considered the living incarnation of Horus — both secular ruler and divine being. The state revolved around Ma'at (cosmic order), with the Vizier as chief administrator, High Priests managing religious affairs, and scribes recording everything, forming a theocratic bureaucracy that endured for three millennia.
